extortion.description: ASA Electronics® has been designing and manufacturing mobile electronic products for the Marine, RV, PowerSports, Agricultural, Construction, Commercial Vehicle, and Bus industries since 1977. Their proprietary brands are JENSEN®, JENSEN Heavy Duty®, iN-Command® Control Systems, Marine Audio®, Voyager® and ADVENT® Air. ASA Electronics is also a distributor in specialty markets for SiriusXM® Satellite Radio and Polk Ultramarine® products.
